title: teline monspessulana
intro: Teline monspessulana, also known as French teline or mountain melilot, is a perennial herb belonging to the pea family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional European folk medicine, due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Teline monspessulana include relief from digestive issues, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
